messages.content:
﻿
Alan Turing and his team were able to break the Enigma Machine because they learned that it would never choose an "A" to represent an "A," and which of the following?
A. Operator strength, intelligence tests, and capture of gas leaks.
B. Operator lapses, intelligence leaks, and the capture of Enigma.
C. Operator lapses, gaseous leaks, and the capture of energy.
D. Operator vacancies, lack of intelligence, and captured soldiers.
B. Operator lapses, intelligence leaks, and the capture of Enigma.

﻿
RSA sends its data in chunks of numbers with many
A. codes
C. keys
B. digits
D. characters
B. digits

﻿
A public-key encryption system that is based on two large prime numbers is
A. APA
B. RSA
C. GTA
D. MLA
B. RSA

﻿
The multiple choice portion of the AP exam accounts for
of a student's
overall AP score.
A. 65%
B. 50%
C. 60%
D. 55%

﻿
The "Create" Performance Task focuses on the creation
of a(n)
A. logic circuit
C. algorithm
B. computer program
D. cipher
B. computer program

﻿
What percentage does the "Create" Performance Task account for in a student's overall AP score?
A. 16%
B. 20%
C. 24%
D. 40%

﻿
The top left section of Snap is
called the:
A. Scripting area
B. Palette
C. Tabs
D. Colors
B. Palette

﻿
The smallest unit of information in electronic communication is a
A. byte
B. kilobyte
C. bit
C. bit

﻿
What color is made up of the following RGB combination:
255,255,255
A. White
C. Green
B. Red
D. Black
A. White

﻿
The number of bits used to represent a number that describes the detail of a quantity is termed its:
B. Accuracy
A. Exact value
C. Numerical precision
D. Binary precision
C. Numerical precision

﻿
What is the last letter we use in hexadecimal notation?
A. E
B. F
C. Z
D. A
B. F

﻿
When converting from binary to decimal, you add powers of
which base?
A. 8
B. 4
C. 2
D. 1

﻿
The order of precedence in evaluating boolean operators
is:
A. NOT, OR, AND.
B. AND, OR, NOT.
C. NOT, AND, OR.
D. AND, NOT, OR.
C. NOT, AND, OR.

﻿
What is the sum bit if you are adding 1 + 1 on a half adder?
A. 11
B. 10
C. O
D. 1

﻿
If we add 101 + 111 using a full adder, what is our output?
A. 1100
B. 1101
C. 1010
D. 0011

﻿
Who created the Game of Life?
A. Turing
B. Conway
C. Gauss
D. Musk
B. Conway

﻿
Who released the Internet to the public?
A. IBM
B. Silicon Valley
C. Government
D. Academia
C. Government

﻿
How many lines of a song might someone be able to copy without running into copyright issues?
A. None
B. Five
C. Most
D. One
A. None
